description: Pet and summon type definitions — controls summoned creature grouping, UI display, automap visibility, and icon assignment. Referenced by the pettype column in Skills.txt.

pet type.description: Pet type name identifier, referenced by Skills.txt pettype column

idx.description: Numeric index for internal pet type lookup. Not read by 1.13c engine

group.description: Pet group ID (pets in the same group are mutually exclusive). Not read by 1.13c engine

basemax.description: Base maximum number of this pet type (for oskill/set bonus pet persistence). Not read by 1.13c engine

warp.description: Pet warps/teleports to follow the player. Not read by 1.13c engine

range.description: Pet has ranged attack capability. Not read by 1.13c engine

partysend.description: Pet responds to party commands. Not read by 1.13c engine

unsummon.description: Pet can be unsummoned by the player. Not read by 1.13c engine

automap.description: Pet appears on the automap. Not read by 1.13c engine

name.description: Pet displays a name. Not read by 1.13c engine

drawhp.description: Draw pet health bar in the UI. Not read by 1.13c engine

icontype.description: Pet icon display type in the UI panel. Not read by 1.13c engine

baseicon.description: Base icon cell index for this pet type. Not read by 1.13c engine

mclass1.description: Monster class 1 that uses this pet icon. Not read by 1.13c engine

micon1.description: Icon cell index for monster class 1. Not read by 1.13c engine

mclass2.description: Monster class 2 that uses this pet icon. Not read by 1.13c engine

micon2.description: Icon cell index for monster class 2. Not read by 1.13c engine

mclass3.description: Monster class 3 that uses this pet icon. Not read by 1.13c engine

micon3.description: Icon cell index for monster class 3. Not read by 1.13c engine

mclass4.description: Monster class 4 that uses this pet icon. Not read by 1.13c engine

micon4.description: Icon cell index for monster class 4. Not read by 1.13c engine

eol.description: End of line marker (not loaded by game). Not read by 1.13c engine
